case_title: MARTIN J. ALPEREN VS. HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HEATHER ASHCROFT, MANAGER, CONTRACT POLICY AND OPERATIONS. FILED BY DEFENDANT HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FATIMA GONZALEZ, SUPERVISOR FILED BY DEFENDANT HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**DENIED**
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL & SUBMITTED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM C. LYNN. PLAINTIFF MARTIN J. ALPEREN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HEATHER ASHCROFT, MANAGER AND FATIMA GONZALEZ, SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM C. LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ALPEREN, MARTIN J. HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-10-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506, DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS NOTIFIED BY TELEPHONE OF TODAY'S CONTINUANCE ON 5-17-22. DEFENDANT HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC., REPRESENTED BY HEATHER ASHCROFT, MANAGER, CONTRACT POLICY AND OPERATIONS AND FATIMA GONZALEZ ARE PRESENT. NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE IS PROVIDED TO THE DEFENDANT. . (506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ALPEREN, MARTIN J. AS TO DEFENDANT HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED APR-01-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HILLS PHYSICIANS MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF'S ACTION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
